name: misell
description: Misell signage delivery QA and CI orchestration.

scripts.test:ci: npm run check:player && npm --prefix apps/player run smoke:local-state && npm --prefix apps/player run smoke:content-apply && npm run validate:playlist && npm run check:cloud && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:backup && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:reporting && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:device-commands && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:counter-order-ux && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:customer-reporting-access && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:ai-campaign-proposals && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:ai-context-source-contract && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:ai-context-source-crud && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:campaign-generator-foundation && npm --prefix apps/cloud run smoke:ad-legal-privacy-gate && npm run check:shell && npm run test:e2e
